label: Transparent sturgeon motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one sturgeon fish, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A large ancient river sturgeon in clean side profile, complete body visible from snout to tail, long armored silhouette, bony scute plates along the back and sides, slate grey dorsal body, cream belly, muted river-green undertones in fins and shadows, subtle pearly highlights on the plates, accurate barbels and elongated snout, realistic fish anatomy and tactile armored texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; horizontal fish orientation; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural slate grey, cream, and river green color with crisp plate detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the fish fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no water, no river scene, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sturgeon light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sturgeon", derived from the transparent sturgeon motif visible in this conversation. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible ancient infrastructure system.
Reference motif: large river sturgeon, elongated armored body, bony scute plates, slate grey dorsal surface, cream belly, muted river-green undertones, pearly plate highlights, long snout and barbels, ancient river context.
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid, no crop.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sturgeon, Sturgeon, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: slate grey, cream, river green, stone graphite, plate ivory, silt taupe, deep channel charcoal, oxidized steel, warning clay, and restrained near-neutrals derived from the sturgeon plates and large river habitat.
Typography: English infrastructure/product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a sturdy humanist sans for English and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, dense operations tables, and monitoring screens. Include short Japanese labels such as 水路, 点検, 検索, 承認.
UI coverage: primary, secondary, ghost, destructive, and icon buttons; inputs; select; textarea; checkbox; radio; switch; segmented tabs; badges; alerts; cards; top navigation; sidebar navigation; breadcrumb; command palette; search filters; empty state; loading state; error state; success state; warning state; toast; pagination; tooltip; modal; date picker; progress; skeleton rows.
Data coverage: dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, stacked area chart, donut chart, river flow KPI, inspection queue, infrastructure asset table, status timeline, small map/grid panel, chart legends using the motif palette.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, plate texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, component density notes.
Style: premium operations design system, light cream surfaces, slate grey structure, river-green status accents, plate-ivory highlights, graphite text, subtle sturgeon scute plate texture, quiet ancient infrastructure mood, compact but readable dashboard density, 8px card radius.
Text: use short readable labels only; labels must be large enough to survive gallery downscaling.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no stock UI kit, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sturgeon", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board

Reference light-board system details to preserve: slate grey structure, plate ivory highlights, river green primary/status controls, silt taupe neutrals, stone graphite text, oxidized steel surfaces, warning clay critical states, sturgeon scute texture, compact infrastructure dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance.

Required visible sections: Morphous Sturgeon, Dark Mode, Sturgeon, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: English infrastructure/product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; sturdy humanist sans for English and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, dense operations tables, and monitoring screens. Include short Japanese labels such as 水路, 点検, 検索, 承認.
UI coverage: primary, secondary, ghost, destructive, and icon buttons; inputs; select; textarea; checkbox; radio; switch; segmented tabs; badges; alerts; cards; top navigation; sidebar navigation; breadcrumb; command palette; search filters; empty state; loading state; error state; success state; warning state; toast; pagination; tooltip; modal; date picker; progress; skeleton rows.
Data coverage: dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, stacked area chart, donut chart, river flow KPI, inspection queue, infrastructure asset table, status timeline, small map/grid panel, chart legends using the motif palette.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, plate texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, component density notes.
Visual details: deep channel charcoal background, elevated panels in stone graphite and oxidized steel, plate ivory text and highlights, river green primary and success accents, silt taupe muted labels, warming clay destructive/warning accents, subtle sturgeon scute texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, compact but readable dark dashboard density, 8px card radius.

Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sturgeon", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
